title: Are you prepared to fish alone?
body: "Safety flyer issued with the investigation report into the man overboard from creel fishing vessel Nista (LK121) north of Belnahua, north-west Scotland on 13 December 2023, resulting in one fatality.  The document summarises the circumstances of the accident and provides multiple safety considerations for members of the fishing community.  This information has been prepared for the:   fishing industry   Related publication  An investigation report has also been prepared for this accident. "
